text:
There once was a black widow spider named Winnetinka*. Winnetinka loved weaving delicate webs. One day, she caught a little brown pellet. She liked it. Winnetinka named it Bob.

Every evening, Bob bounced around Winnetinka's house. Sometimes she'd enjoy it. Other times, she wished he'd quiet down. She'd just tell him something funny.

One evening, Winnetinka said, "*That doesn't wiggle!*"

Bob froze.

"*Like you!*".

She laughed.

And so Bob lived happily ever after.

*The *o* didn't bother her.

That was true. Maybe all things got tired...just the things we wouldn't notice.

That afternoon.

Winnetinka spun another web. Bob liked that.

Tomorrow...
